title: Recover Python announce state ordering
description: Recover checkpoint announce processor and scheduler fixes without publishing seen/TOFU state before route installation succeeds. Validate interval and jitter configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Gradient/address failure leaves seen and pinned state unchanged; retry remains possible; nonpositive intervals and negative jitter reject; focused tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Recovered exception-safe announce route/TOFU/replay ordering and scheduler timing validation, including runtime mutation handling. Focused 68 passed; full Python 2671 passed, 26 skipped; Ruff and scoped mypy clean; three final reviews clean. Commit 78a8d5b01.
